title: Maxwell Heller
text:
Programming and data processing: Experience writing Python, R, Arduino, and ESP8266 code to collect, clean, process, and display data.
Hardware and circuit troubleshooting: Able to wire sensors, motors, displays, and microcontrollers while debugging issues with power, pins, and communication.
Technical problem-solving: Comfortable breaking down complex projects, testing step by step, finding errors, and explaining how the system works clearly.





College coursework in computer science and data analysis: Studied programming, databases, statistics, and data visualization and algorithms.
Experience with technical labs and projects: Completed coursework involving Arduino circuits, sensors, microcontrollers, spatial data, and real-time data systems.
Strong foundation in math and problem-solving: Built skills through calculus, linear algebra, statistics, data modeling, and simulations.

title: Hobbies
text:
I do screen printing for myself and a band manidoo.
I play pool very often at my local billards hall. I recently bought my own pool que.
Ive been creating digital art for almost 5 years.
